ranked.advancement_note: directly answers Q1 by specifying a deterministic fusion mechanism with a self-correcting meta-layer that guards against the exact failure mode (motivated convergence) the question implies
ranked.opens_new_gap: no specification of what the forced precedence inversion does to in-flight agent waves already dispatched under the prior precedence order
ranked.rationale: The most direct answer to Q1 of the four blends — it names the fusion rule, names the conflict-resolution logic, and names the drift-detection mechanism that keeps the rule honest; the other questions are not its focus but it does not contradict them.

ranked.advancement_note: directly answers Q3 by giving a two-axis, judge-free observable rule that discriminates unfillable from under-attempted — the hardest fork in the question
ranked.opens_new_gap: approach-vector entropy is undefined as a measurable unit — what constitutes a distinct 'approach class' and who assigns fingerprints to classes is unspecified
ranked.rationale: Cleanly advances Q3 and partially Q2 (forced-novel dispatch implies a sizing decision), but leaves Q1 and Q4 untouched; the entropy operationalization gap (G12) is real and load-bearing for the mechanism to function.

ranked.advancement_note: directly answers the halt-condition sub-problem (Q3 termination branch and the conflict between coverage-complete and diminishing-returns) with a concrete three-signal consensus rule
ranked.opens_new_gap: veto logic with latency-mismatched signals can produce indefinite non-termination if one slow-updating signal (e.g. DoD) is structurally stuck below threshold — no floor on how long a single veto can hold
ranked.rationale: Strong on the termination question but narrow — Q1, Q2, and Q4 are not advanced; the latency mismatch it partially addresses (G15) is real but the veto-deadlock risk it opens is equally real.

ranked.advancement_note: advances Q4 (diversity preservation during re-exploration) and partially Q2 (agent-count sizing falls out of the routing-cost mechanics) without a separate policing module
ranked.opens_new_gap: the decay function's shape and the track-record metric are both unspecified — the self-defeating property only holds if the routing-cost rise is calibrated correctly, and no signal tells the orchestrator when that calibration has drifted
ranked.rationale: Genuinely novel on diversity self-restoration and advances Q4 more than any other blend, but its contribution to Q1, Q3, and the halt decision is indirect at best; the unspecified decay calibration is a real implementation gap.
